summary: A well-rounded 4-3-3 with everything required to go far — though counter-press positioning and transitions are a concern.
style: 4-3-3 — winger 1v1, overlapping fullbacks, flood the box.

counterReliance.note: Possession side — floods the box, not a counter team

strengths: Bits of everything needed for a deep run

keyPlayers.name: Cody Gakpo
keyPlayers.note: Goalscoring from range, 1v1 to create & assist, strong work-ethic back

tactics: Get the wingers 1v1, overlap the fullbacks and flood the box. The squad has everything — the watch-out is exposure in transition.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
